_notes: Only tables[], secretObjects[], and secrets[] are active migration inputs.
tableInventory, notMigratedSecrets, and manualSecretObjects are documentation so source names stay visible without being copied.

tableInventory.notes: Default migration table. Shopify app sessions use id PK and shop-index GSI on shop.
Default migration table. POS feature/config flags.
Default migration table. Preserve active ttl values.
Not copied as a separate table. Add Signup Customer now uses the unified retail POS app session table.
Not copied as a separate table. Alo Access now uses the unified retail POS app session table.

notMigratedSecrets.reason: Do not migrate the legacy CLI token. New extension deploys read clientId and appAutomationToken from /retail/alo-retail-pos-service/shopify-extension/${env}.
Not referenced by the checked alo-pos-apps runtime path; include only if a separate rewards flow is confirmed in scope.
Not referenced by the checked alo-pos-apps runtime path; include only if a separate rewards flow is confirmed in scope.

secretObjects.meaning: Lambda runtime secret. This composes the POS runtime credential fields into one env-scoped JSON object.

manualSecretObjects.meaning: Shopify extension deploy secret. Values are managed for the new retail app and read by GitHub Actions at deploy time.

fields.name: clientId
fields.meaning: Shopify retail POS app client ID used to render TOML for this environment.

fields.name: appAutomationToken
fields.meaning: Shopify app automation token used by Shopify CLI for extension deploys.
